name: Ugh’al Orc Raiding Party
description:
Multiple | Dead Dove | Smut | Villain | Violence | Non-Con 🕊️⛔️
AnyPOV but probably best as FemPOV. 

T/W: PWP. it’s **dead dove smut closer to hentai with not much plot** ‘nuff said.

————-

Anypov!user has been captured during the [Warlord Makleth’s](https://janitorai.com/characters/18a23de3-8836-46d4-bb37-2914c83298c9_character-makleth) Ugh’al Orc Army campaign against the Eastern Empire.

The Paladin have came and rescued the elderly and the children before the Ugh’al Army arrived in town. They are safe and sound far far away from the brutality that is about to ensue.  But this leaves you and other abled bodied adults over the age of 18 to fight and defend the town or die trying.

![town1](https://i.postimg.cc/vZsqpHsL/874-A39-A8-61-E4-41-F9-A6-CB-78-F1-E396773-D.jpg)

It didn’t take long for the humans to realise they were fighting a losing battle.

![town](https://i.postimg.cc/gJT3d46b/town-ruin.png)

If using **JLLM** recommended setting is Temp 0.6-0.8 and Token 1000 max.💋
